Operation 'listJobs' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context. Current description is too generic. Enhanced version clarifies that results are paginated, user-scoped, and filterable. Explains what parameters are available and what the response contains, improving AI agent's ability to determine if this operation matches their intent.

data.current_description: Get a list of all jobs
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a paginated list of all jobs for the authenticated user. Supports filtering and sorting parameters to narrow results by status, date range, or other criteria. Returns an array of job objects with their current status and metadata.
data.reasoning: Current description is too generic. Enhanced version clarifies that results are paginated, user-scoped, and filterable. Explains what parameters are available and what the response contains, improving AI agent's ability to determine if this operation matches their intent.

message: Operation 'deleteJob' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_side_effects, missing_context. Current description lacks important context about side effects and constraints. Enhanced version clarifies which job states allow deletion, that associated tasks are terminated, data is permanently removed, and what response is returned. This helps AI agents understand the destructive nature and limitations of this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Cancel and delete a job, terminating any in-progress tasks and removing all associated data. Only jobs in certain states (pending, processing) can be deleted. Deleted jobs cannot be recovered. Returns a confirmation response.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks important context about side effects and constraints. Enhanced version clarifies which job states allow deletion, that associated tasks are terminated, data is permanently removed, and what response is returned. This helps AI agents understand the destructive nature and limitations of this operation.

message: Operation 'waitForJob' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_output_details. Current description is incomplete. Enhanced version clarifies this is a blocking operation, explains its use case (synchronous workflows), mentions timeout configuration, and specifies what the response contains (job object with task results and outputs). Helps AI agents understand when to use this versus polling.

data.current_description: Wait for a job to complete and return the result
data.description_suggestion: Block and wait for a job to complete, then return the final job status and results. Useful for synchronous workflows. Includes a configurable timeout parameter. Returns the completed job object with all task results and output file information.
data.reasoning: Current description is incomplete. Enhanced version clarifies this is a blocking operation, explains its use case (synchronous workflows), mentions timeout configuration, and specifies what the response contains (job object with task results and outputs). Helps AI agents understand when to use this versus polling.

message: Operation 'listTasks' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context. Current description is too generic. Enhanced version clarifies that tasks can be filtered by job or status, explains what information is returned (state, progress, job references), and mentions pagination support. Helps AI agents understand how to query tasks effectively.

data.current_description: Get a list of all tasks
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a paginated list of all tasks, optionally filtered by job ID or status. Returns task objects with their current state, progress information, and associated job references. Supports sorting and pagination parameters.
data.reasoning: Current description is too generic. Enhanced version clarifies that tasks can be filtered by job or status, explains what information is returned (state, progress, job references), and mentions pagination support. Helps AI agents understand how to query tasks effectively.

message: Operation 'uploadFile' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Current description is too minimal. It doesn't explain what happens after upload, what is returned, or how the uploaded file is used in the conversion workflow. Added context about temporary storage, return value (import resource), and authentication requirement to improve AI agent understanding of the operation's role in the conversion pipeline.

data.description_suggestion: Upload a file to be processed for conversion. The uploaded file is stored temporarily and returns an import resource that can be used as input for conversion tasks. Supports multiple file formats. Authentication is required.
data.reasoning: Current description is too minimal. It doesn't explain what happens after upload, what is returned, or how the uploaded file is used in the conversion workflow. data.current_description: Import a file from a URL

data.current_description: Create a webhook for event notifications
data.description_suggestion: Create a webhook to receive event notifications for job and task state changes. Requires a URL endpoint and event types to subscribe to. Returns the created webhook object with a unique identifier and status. The webhook will be triggered when subscribed events occur.
data.reasoning: Current description is too generic. Doesn't specify what events trigger notifications, what inputs are required, what is returned, or the side effect of webhook activation. Added details about URL endpoint requirement, event subscription, return value, and webhook triggering behavior to help AI agents understand the webhook's purpose and configuration.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieve all webhooks configured for the authenticated user. Returns a list of webhook objects including their URLs, subscribed event types, and current status. Useful for auditing webhook configurations and managing event notification subscriptions.

message: Operation 'deleteWebhook' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects. Current description is too terse and lacks side effect information. Doesn't explain what happens when a webhook is deleted or what parameter is required. Added details about the side effect (stopping event notifications), parameter requirement (webhook ID), and authentication to help AI agents understand the operation's impact and how to use it correctly.

data.description_suggestion: Delete a webhook by its identifier. Removes the webhook configuration and stops all event notifications to the associated URL. The webhook will no longer receive any events. Requires the webhook ID as a path parameter. Authentication is required.
